name: Weight Heist
text1: A foreign intelligence service attempted to exfiltrate model weights from a declared lab. The intrusion was detected by the lab's security team.
text2: A foreign intelligence service exfiltrated model weights from a declared lab. The breach went undetected for months. The weights surfaced in a non-signatory nation's military research program.
image-prompt: A dark server room with a shadowy figure downloading files onto a portable drive, green terminal text reflected on their face, embassy documents visible in their pocket, espionage thriller atmosphere, digital painting, no text
